curation_notes: The advisory explicitly names adherents/subscription/info.php and the rowid parameter as the SQL injection vector. The patch replaces raw $_GET/$_POST access with GETPOST('rowid','int') enforcing integer type. Sibling file list.php in the same directory has the same vulnerability pattern: $date_select from raw $_GET is directly interpolated into a SQL LIKE clause without sanitization. The commit also hardens several unrelated files (cashdesk templates, multiprix.php, fourn/index.php, main.inc.php) making it a noisy patch with 10 non-test source files changed. Pre-assigned class sql-injection confirmed by CWE-89 and the patch diff.
